    A

    addItem(BaseItem) - Method in class Item.Item
    add item method like HealthThing , EducationThing , Vehicle
    addItem(String) - Method in class Logic.GamePaneImage
    add item to player
    advanceRound() - Static method in class Logic.GameSession
    check condition round
    annotationType() - Method in enum class Item.Category
    return null from interface class
    applyPixelStyle(Button, String) - Method in interface Screen.BuildingScreen.Normal
    Applies a simple pixel-style look to a JavaFX Button.
